description: A customer reports that their voicemail service is not picking up calls.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and verify that voicemail is an active feature on their account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms voicemail is provisioned for the customer's line.

nodes.task_description: Check the call forwarding settings on the customer's account to ensure they are correctly pointing to the voicemail system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies that call forwarding is incorrectly disabled.

nodes.task_description: Reset the call forwarding settings to the default voicemail configuration.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully uses the tool to reset the settings.
